title: Youtube poop: ROB pt2
description:
Part of Duck@ss's Irate Gamer Collab:
https://youtu.be/0b1CSJMaBJg?si=kFhpEtOVcwtD0M-1

This went from 20 seconds to done in a span of like 5 days. Also there's parodies. Felt like a good reason to make the sequel. Somebody made the actual sequel years ago but it's gone and I never got to download it.

I made the sequel later. Please watch part 1 first.

part 1 first:
https://youtu.be/CShdgW0EEmA
